device_template.name: Generic MQTT (JSON)
device_template.author: built-in
device_template.description: Starter map for a device that publishes JSON on MQTT (Shelly, Tasmota, Zigbee2MQTT, ESPHome, custom). Each measurement reads a topic and a json_path into the payload — edit these to match your device, then add or remove rows in Measurements.

normal.description: MQTT input is push-driven; interval is informational

registers.name: power
registers.label: Power
registers.description: Example: field 'power' in the JSON payload

registers.name: voltage
registers.label: Voltage
registers.description: Example: field 'voltage' in the JSON payload

registers.name: current
registers.label: Current
registers.description: Example: field 'current' in the JSON payload
